'''√g-ch-f''' ('''kagachaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:custom|custom]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:custom|custom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √g-ch-f
|-
! Lemma
| kagachaf
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thigachaf || jigachaf || shigachaf || kigachaf
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthugachaf || jujugachaf || shushugachaf || kukugachaf
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thugachaf || jugachaf || shugachaf || kugachaf
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thugachaf || jugachaf || shugachaf || kugachaf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thegachaf || jegachaf || shegachaf || kegachaf
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothogachaf || jojogachaf || shoshogachaf || kokogachaf
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thogachaf || jogachaf || shogachaf || kogachaf
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thogachaf || jogachaf || shogachaf || kogachaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || gachaf || gachaf || gachaf || gachaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || gachaf || gachaf || gachaf || gachaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || gachaf || gachaf || gachaf || gachaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || gachaf || gachaf || gachaf || gachaf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thægachaf || jægachaf || shægachaf || kægachaf
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathagachaf || jajagachaf || shashagachaf || kakagachaf
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thagachaf || jagachaf || shagachaf || kagachaf
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thagachaf || jagachaf || shagachaf || kagachaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shagachaf
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshagachaf
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishagachaf
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shagachafnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshagachafnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishagachafnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shagachafshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshagachafnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishagachafshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shagachafro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshagachafnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishagachafro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shagachafmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshagachafnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishagachafmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shagachafsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshagachafnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishagachafsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shagachafng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshagachafnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishagachafng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shagachafya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshagachafnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishagachafya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shagachafyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshagachafnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishagachafyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shagachafnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshagachafnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishagachafnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shagachafnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagachafnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagachafnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shagachafnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshagachafnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagachafnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shagachafshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshagachafnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishagachafshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shagachafshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagachafnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagachafshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shagachafshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshagachafnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagachafshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shagachafronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshagachafnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishagachafronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shagachafroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshagachafnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishagachafroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shagachafromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshagachafnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagachafromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shagachafmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshagachafnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishagachafmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shagachafmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshagachafnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishagachafmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shagachafmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagachafnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagachafmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
